fields.date: The date the request was submitted

fields.department: Department or section of the employee
fields.leave_type: Type of leave (e.g. sick, casual, annual, unpaid)

fields.item_name: Name of the item or equipment

employee_registration.name: Employee Registration Form (Personal Info — Page 1 only)

fields.date: Date the form was filled out

employee_registration_full.name: Employee Registration Form (Full — Personal + Employment, 2 pages)

fields.date: Date the form was filled out
fields.emergency_contact_name: Full name of the emergency contact person
fields.emergency_contact_phone: Phone number of the emergency contact
fields.position: Job title or designation of the employee
fields.employment_type: Type of employment (e.g. full-time, part-time, contract)

fields.previous_employer: Name of the employee's previous employer, if any
